title: ServiceContract
description: Structural schema for a GodspeedOS service contract (service.toml). See §13.

name.description: Service name. Stable identifier; used as the name-directory key.

ipc_send.description: Services this service may send IPC messages to.

ipc_receive.description: Endpoint names this service owns and may receive on.

log_write.description: Permission to send log messages to the logger service.

service_control.description: Supervisor-only: authority to kill and restart services.

spawn.description: init-only: list of services init may spawn.

hw_interrupt.description: IRQ lines the service is allowed to receive.

hw_pio.description: I/O port ranges: base+length in hex (e.g. 0x170+0x8). Port I/O is kernel-mediated and validated per access (docs/persistence.md §5).

hw_device.description: The discovered PCI device CLASS this driver is granted (its MMIO BAR + a DMA arena + bus-master). The kernel resolves the runtime BAR address by the PCI scan (kernel service_hw / HwClass); this class is reconciled against the kernel by scripts/contract_check.py (audit T1 Phase B).

resource_mint.description: Authority to mint delegated resource capabilities - a file for fs, a socket for net-stack (§7.10, file-as-capability). Gated: granted only to services that legitimately issue resources.

core.description: Required core ID (§9.2). Omit for round-robin.
